name: Low Fat Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the thawed orange juice concentrate (not regular orange juice) with marjoram, garlic powder, and nutmeg.
2. Split the chicken breasts to make 6 serving sizes.
3. Dip each piece into the orange juice mixture to coat completely.
4. Place the coated chicken pieces in the crockpot.
Serving Ideas:
Serve with brown or white rice.
Notes:
This recipe takes less than 10 minutes to prepare in the morning and can be ready when you get home. For an even healthier variation, use boneless skinless chicken breasts.
